public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master.
appearance: Sorra Waycord carries the marks of deputy master in road dust and lacquer: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Speaks in controlled terms that leave room for maneuver while still sounding decisive. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of deputy master in and around Nomdara Council of Elders, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Nomdara Council of Elders while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to contract dishonor is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Sorra Waycord needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through Nomdara Council of Elders.
Getting entangled with Sorra Waycord can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on Nomdara Council of Elders.
Sorra Waycord can trade usable insight about Nomdara Council of Elders if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Sorra Waycord carries civic or noble weight.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Council of Elders: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats

first_impression: Sorra Waycord presents as Speaks in controlled terms that leave room for maneuver while still sounding decisive. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Deputy Master, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
what_they_refuse: Sorra Waycord refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Deputy Master too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Sorra Waycord can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Sorra Waycord adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Sorra Waycord is Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Deputy Master.
social_texture: Sorra Waycord speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Nomdara Council of Elders, people read them as trade-fluent, mobile, and instinctively alert to changing leverage.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to credit and supply; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but contract dishonor becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Sorra touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Sorra Waycord when the party needs a socially grounded face for Nomdara Council of Elders: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
